query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS donor_profiles (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT,
  donor_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  donor_email VARCHAR(255),
  donor_phone VARCHAR(50),
  donor_address TEXT,
  donor_city VARCHAR(100),
  donor_state VARCHAR(50),
  donor_zip VARCHAR(20),
  donor_country VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'USA',
  donor_type ENUM('individual', 'corporation', 'foundation', 'estate', 'daf', 'other') DEFAULT 'individual',
  organization_name VARCHAR(255),
  current_tier_id INT,
  lifetime_giving DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytd_giving DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  first_donation_date DATE,
  last_donation_date DATE,
  donation_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  preferred_contact_method ENUM('email', 'phone', 'mail') DEFAULT 'email',
  communication_preferences JSON,
  is_anonymous BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  honor_memorial_name VARCHAR(255),
  honor_memorial_type ENUM('in_honor', 'in_memory') DEFAULT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

  last_donation_date DATE,

  honor_memorial_name VARCHAR(255),
  honor_memorial_type ENUM('in_honor', 'in_memory') DEFAULT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
